bird.summary: The buff-browed chachalaca (Ortalis superciliaris) is a species of bird in the family Cracidae, the chachalacas, guans, and curassows. It i…

locations.name: 帕拉州
locations.summary: 帕拉（葡萄牙語：Pará，巴西葡萄牙语發音：[pa.'ɾa]）是巴西北部的一个州，首府貝倫。与帕拉州相邻的巴西州份有阿马帕州、马拉尼昂州、托坎廷斯州、马托格罗索州、亚马孙州和罗赖马州。 该州与圭亚那、苏里南接壤。

locations.name: 马拉尼昂州
locations.summary: 馬拉尼昂州（葡萄牙語：Maranhão，IPA：ma.ɾa.'ɲɐ̃w̃是巴西的一個州，位於東北部大西洋岸。面積331,983平方公里，2005年人口6,109,694人。首府聖路易斯。自2015年1月1日起，该州由巴西共产党执政。 倫索…

locations.name: 塞阿拉州
locations.summary: 塞阿拉州（葡萄牙語：Ceará，[seaˈɾa] ）是巴西26个联邦州之一，位于东北地区北部，东邻北里奥格兰德州和帕拉伊巴州，南邻伯南布哥州，西邻皮奥伊州，北和东北方向濒临大西洋。塞阿拉州面积为148,894.442平方千米，占东北地区面…

locations.name: 托坎廷斯州
locations.summary: 托坎廷斯（葡萄牙語：Tocantins），是巴西的26州之一， 地处中部。 面积277,620.91平方千米， 首府是帕尔马斯（Palmas）。托坎廷斯东北部是马拉尼昂州， 东部是皮奥伊州和巴伊亚州， 南部是戈亚斯州， 西部是马托格罗索州…

relations.subject: Buff-browed chachalaca
relations.evidence: The buff-browed chachalaca is found in northeastern Brazil south of the Amazon River in parts of the states of Pará, Maranhão, Ceará, Tocantins, and Piauí

relations.subject: Buff-browed chachalaca
relations.evidence: It is a bird of the lowlands, inhabiting scrublands and forest thickets including those in heavily degraded areas
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Buff-browed chachalaca
relations.evidence: The IUCN originally assessed the buff-browed chachalaca as Near Threatened but since 2012 has rated it as being of Least Concern. "Threats [are] listed as habitat destruction and fragmentation, heavy hunting pressure and trade, all of which suggest that it is declining."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Buff-browed chachalaca

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
